ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Subject, Object) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the entity (e.g., manual, automated, external API) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the entity (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject in the relationship */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object in the relationship */,
  "predicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicate describing the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_predicate_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicate_id") REFERENCES predicates ("predicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predicates" (
  "predicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predicate */,
  "predicate_name" TEXT /* Name of the predicate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predicate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predicate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predicate was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the predicate (e.g., manual, automated, external API) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the predicate (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predicate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lexical_cues" (
  "cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lexical cue */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated entity or predicate */,
  "cue_text" TEXT /* Text of the lexical cue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lexical cue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lexical cue was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the lexical cue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lexical_cues_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being versioned */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the entity */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being requested for change */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change request was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
